entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A food and nutritional security crop cultivated in semi-arid regions of Asia and Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is widely cultivated

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is widely cultivated

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that hinder pigeonpea productivity

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living organisms that hinder pigeonpea productivity

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that infest and damage pigeonpea at various development stages

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: A critical tool for sustainable management of insect pests in pigeonpea

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Chemical characteristics of the plant that confer resistance to pests

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics of the plant that confer resistance to pests

entities.name: GENETIC TRAITS
entities.description: Hereditary characteristics that confer resistance to pests

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: A method used to accelerate the development of pest-resistant pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the genome used to accelerate the development of pest-resistant pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring physical traits to accelerate the development of pest-resistant pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: CHEMICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of chemicals to manage insect pests

entities.name: MULTI-OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: Integrated analysis of multiple omics data to understand host-insect interactions

entities.name: GENE-EDITING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to modify genes to improve pest resistance

entities.name: NOVEL BREEDING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: New methods for developing improved crop varieties

entities.name: HOST-INSECT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The biological interactions between the pigeonpea plant and insect pests

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: A targeted approach to crop improvement facilitated by emerging research

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to pest control incorporating host plant resistance

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
